title: Silky Adventurous Bean Sprouts Stir-fry
description: A smoky and silky vegan Malaysian dish featuring bean sprouts with a deglaze technique to add depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Fish sauce (optional for added umami, omit if soy sauce is used instead)

instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add garlic and scallions, stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add bean sprouts to the wok and stir-fry for about 2 minutes or until they start to wilt slightly.
Pour soya sauce, water/stock, and optional fish sauce into the wok. Stir well to combine ingredients.
Reduce heat to low and mix in cornstarch. Stir quickly for an additional minute to allow the sauce to thicken slightly.
Add finely chopped chili pepper(s) last if you like it spicy. Stir and serve hot.
